context_completed-hint: Completed jobs — those which have finished successfully (i.e. consumed entire input and exited with zero exit code). Please note that due to hardware failures some jobs may be run more than once.
context_aborted-hint: Aborted jobs — those with soft failure (i.e. resource overdraft or preemption). Please note that some of aborted jobs may be excluded from statistics.
context_failed-hint: Failed jobs — those with hard failure (i.e. exited with non-zero exit code). Please note that some of failed jobs may be excluded from statistics.
context_lost-hint: Lost jobs — those which have finished successfully but whose results were lost (typically due to hardware failures).
